selection_notes.scope: Non-exhaustive, deliberately diverse sample of Ubuntu 24.04 repository packages that directly runtime-depend on libjansson4.
method: Confirmed package relationships locally on Ubuntu 24.04.3 LTS with apt-cache.
Inspected extracted Ubuntu source packages to identify the concrete runtime functionality that uses libjansson.

dependents.runtime_functionality: Built-in JSON parsing and serialization exposed to Lisp, including json-serialize and json-parse-string.
source_evidence: src/json.c:592 defines json-serialize
src/json.c:941 defines json-parse-string
lisp/subr.el:6971 defines json-available-p as a libjansson capability check

dependents.runtime_functionality: HTTP control/admin API and event delivery parse JSON requests and emit JSON responses/events.
source_evidence: src/transports/janus_http.c:1021 implements janus_http_send_message(json_t *message)
src/transports/janus_http.c:1623 serializes queued events with json_dumps
src/transports/janus_http.c:1652 sends application/json responses
src/transports/janus_http.c:1675 parses request payloads with json_loads

dependents.runtime_functionality: Command-line JSON querying and editing from stdin/files, with optional JSONP stripping before parse and JSON emission after transformation.
source_evidence: jshon.c:79 defines compat_json_loads
jshon.c:934 removes a JSONP callback before parsing when requested
jshon.c:937 parses input with compat_json_loads
jshon.c:1001 creates JSON string values for updates

dependents.runtime_functionality: CLI and library support for JOSE JSON objects: JWS, JWE, JWK, JWA, and JWT processing.
source_evidence: README.md:9 lists RFC 7515 (JWS)
README.md:10 lists RFC 7516 (JWE)
README.md:11 lists RFC 7517 (JWK)
README.md:13 lists RFC 7519 (JWT)
lib/misc.c:23 encode_protected(json_t *obj) rewrites protected JOSE headers
lib/misc.c:48 calls json_object_seed(0)

dependents.runtime_functionality: JSON report output mode that emits hop-by-hop and summary network metrics as structured JSON.
source_evidence: NEWS:93 says report JSON was reworked with libjansson
ui/report.c:296 implements json_close(struct mtr_ctl *ctl)
ui/report.c:384 writes the final report with json_dumpf

dependents.runtime_functionality: EVE JSON logging, including the default eve.json output and protocol-specific JSON event logging.
source_evidence: src/output-json.c:23 says it logs detection and monitoring events in JSON format
src/output-json.c:75 sets the default log filename to eve.json
src/output-json.c:103 defines SCJsonString returning jansson json_t values

dependents.runtime_functionality: Key advertisement and recovery endpoints emit application/jose+json, parse JSON recovery requests, and return application/jwk+json responses.
source_evidence: src/tangd.c:93 serializes advertisements with json_dumps
src/tangd.c:98 replies with Content-Type: application/jose+json
src/tangd.c:123 parses request bodies with json_loads
src/tangd.c:167 performs JWK exchange via jose_jwk_exc
src/tangd.c:182 replies with Content-Type: application/jwk+json

dependents.runtime_functionality: teamdctl parses JSON status/configuration dumps and teamd serializes live daemon state as JSON.
source_evidence: utils/teamdctl.c:80 parses JSON dumps with json_loads
utils/teamdctl.c:94 pretty-prints JSON dumps with json_dumps
utils/teamdctl.c:145 parses setup/state fields from JSON
teamd/teamd_state.c:475 serializes teamd state with json_dumps

dependents.runtime_functionality: Netfilter packet and flow logging to JSON files or sockets, with /var/log/ulogd.json as the default file target.
source_evidence: output/ulogd_output_JSON.c:3 describes a JSON logging target
output/ulogd_output_JSON.c:41 defines the default file target /var/log/ulogd.json
output/ulogd_output_JSON.c:584 registers the JSON plugin

dependents.runtime_functionality: JSON IPC control/events interface that parses requests, validates IDs, creates event objects, and packs responses.
source_evidence: src/json-ipc.c:64 parses incoming JSON IPC requests
src/json-ipc.c:81 rejects invalid request IDs
src/json-ipc.c:109 creates JSON IPC events
src/json-ipc.c:191 packs JSON IPC responses

dependents.runtime_functionality: Converts Redis replies to JSON or JSONP over HTTP/WebSocket and parses JSON ACL/configuration data.
source_evidence: src/formats/json.c:15 implements JSON HTTP replies
src/formats/json.c:40 sends application/json responses
src/formats/json.c:116 converts Redis reply structures into JSON
src/conf.c:141 parses ACL objects from JSON configuration
